chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 255 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter 1. For orders on MA No.196/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.197/2024 (R/Surety) 05.03.2024 Mr. Irshad Ali Lashari, Advocate for applicant/surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. This application is filed by applicant Parvez Ali seeking return of surety. As per arguments of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Azam Ali, who, on 09.12.2021, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original Defence Savings Certificate of such amount, has surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated time and obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from the letter dated 14.12.2021, issued by the office of learned Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court No. XVI, Karachi, annexed with this application. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in some other matters, after waiving notice, has extended his no objection for granting this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
